name: aircrack-ng
title: aircrack-ng
description:
wireless WEP/WPA cracking utilities
aircrack-ng is an 802.11a/b/g WEP/WPA cracking program that can recover a
40-bit, 104-bit, 256-bit or 512-bit WEP key once enough encrypted packets
have been gathered. Also it can attack WPA1/2 networks with some advanced
methods or simply by brute force.
.
It implements the standard FMS attack along with some optimizations,
thus making the attack much faster compared to other WEP cracking tools.
It can also fully use a multiprocessor system to its full power in order
to speed up the cracking process.
.
aircrack-ng is a fork of aircrack, as that project has been stopped by
the upstream maintainer.

commands.name: aircrack-ng
commands.description: a 802.11 WEP / WPA-PSK key cracker

arguments.description: Force the attack mode: 1 or wep for WEP (802.11) and 2 or wpa for WPA/WPA2 PSK (802.11i
arguments.raw: -a  Force the attack mode: 1 or wep for WEP (802.11) and 2 or wpa for WPA/WPA2 PSK (802.11i

arguments.description: Search alphanumeric characters only.
arguments.raw: -c  Search alphanumeric characters only.

arguments.description: Create Elcomsoft Wireless Security Auditor (EWSA) Project file v3.02.
arguments.raw: -E  Create Elcomsoft Wireless Security Auditor (EWSA) Project file v3.02.

arguments.description: Select the target network based on the ESSID. This option is also required for WPA
arguments.raw: -e  Select the target network based on the ESSID. This option is also required for WPA

arguments.description: By default, this parameter is set to 2. Use a higher value to increase the bruteforce
arguments.raw: -f  By default, this parameter is set to 2. Use a higher value to increase the bruteforce

arguments.description: Search the numeric key for Fritz!BOX
arguments.raw: -h  Search the numeric key for Fritz!BOX

arguments.description: Only keep the IVs that have this key index (1 to 4). The default behavior is to ignore
arguments.raw: -i  Only keep the IVs that have this key index (1 to 4). The default behavior is to ignore

arguments.description: Use KoreK attacks instead of PTW.
arguments.raw: -K  Use KoreK attacks instead of PTW.

arguments.description: There are 17 KoreK attacks. Sometimes one attack creates a huge false positive that
arguments.raw: -k  There are 17 KoreK attacks. Sometimes one attack creates a huge false positive that

arguments.description: Write the key into a file. Overwrites the file if it already exists.
arguments.raw: -l  Write the key into a file. Overwrites the file if it already exists.

arguments.raw: -M  Specify maximum number of IVs to use.

arguments.description: Only keep the IVs coming from packets that match this MAC address. Alternatively, use

arguments.description: Specify the length of the key: 64 for 40-bit WEP, 128 for 104-bit WEP, etc., until 512
arguments.raw: -n  Specify the length of the key: 64 for 40-bit WEP, 128 for 104-bit WEP, etc., until 512

arguments.description: a 802.11 WEP / WPA-PSK key cracker
arguments.raw: -ng  a 802.11 WEP / WPA-PSK key cracker

arguments.description: Set this option to the number of CPUs to use (only available on SMP systems) for crack-
arguments.raw: -p  Set this option to the number of CPUs to use (only available on SMP systems) for crack-

arguments.description: If set, no status information is displayed.
arguments.raw: -q  If set, no status information is displayed.

arguments.description: Path to the airolib-ng database. Cannot be used with '-w'.
arguments.raw: -r  Path to the airolib-ng database. Cannot be used with '-w'.

arguments.description: WPA cracking speed test.
arguments.raw: -S  WPA cracking speed test.

arguments.description: Shows ASCII version of the key at the right of the screen.
arguments.raw: -s  Shows ASCII version of the key at the right of the screen.

arguments.description: Shows a list of the available SIMD architectures, separated by a space character. Air-
arguments.raw: --simd-list  Shows a list of the available SIMD architectures, separated by a space character. Air-

arguments.description: Search binary coded decimal characters only.
arguments.raw: -t  Search binary coded decimal characters only.

arguments.description: Path to a dictionary file for wpa cracking. Separate filenames with comma when using
arguments.raw: -w  Path to a dictionary file for wpa cracking. Separate filenames with comma when using

arguments.description: Disable bruteforce multithreading (SMP only).
arguments.raw: -X  Disable bruteforce multithreading (SMP only).

arguments.description: Enable last keybyte bruteforcing (default)
arguments.raw: -x1  Enable last keybyte bruteforcing (default)

arguments.raw: -x2  Enable last two keybytes bruteforcing.

commands.name: airdecap-ng
commands.description: decrypt a WEP/WPA encrypted pcap file

commands.name: airdecloak-ng
commands.description: Removes wep cloaked framed from a pcap file.

commands.name: airolib-ng
commands.description: manage and create a WPA/WPA2 pre-computed hashes tables

commands.name: besside-ng-crawler
commands.description: filter EAPOL frames from a directory of capture files.

commands.name: buddy-ng
commands.description: a tool to work with easside-ng

commands.name: dcrack
commands.description: Unknown cmd --help

commands.name: ivstools
commands.description: extract IVs from a pcap file or merges several .ivs files into one

commands.name: kstats
commands.description: show statistical FMS algorithm votes for an ivs dump and a specified WEP key

commands.name: makeivs-ng
commands.description: generate a dummy IVS dump file with a specific WEP key

commands.name: packetforge-ng
commands.description: forge packets: ARP, UDP, ICMP or custom packets.

commands.name: wpaclean
commands.description: clean wpa capture files

commands.name: airbase-ng
commands.description: multi-purpose tool aimed at attacking clients as opposed to the Access Point (AP) itself

commands.name: aireplay-ng
commands.description: inject packets into a wireless network to generate traffic

commands.name: airmon-ng
commands.description: POSIX sh script designed to turn wireless cards into monitor mode.

commands.name: airodump-ng
commands.description: a wireless packet capture tool for aircrack-ng

commands.name: airodump-ng-oui-update
commands.description: IEEE oui list updater for airodump-ng

commands.name: airserv-ng
commands.description: a wireless card server

commands.name: airtun-ng
commands.description: a virtual tunnel interface creator for aircrack-ng

commands.name: airventriloquist-ng
commands.description: encrypted WiFi packet injection

commands.name: besside-ng
commands.description: crack a WEP or WPA key without user intervention and collaborate with WPA cracking statistics

commands.name: easside-ng
commands.description: an auto-magic tool which allows you to communicate via an WEP-encrypted AP without knowing the key

commands.name: tkiptun-ng
commands.description: inject a few frames into a WPA TKIP network with QoS

commands.name: wesside-ng
commands.description: crack a WEP key of an open network without user intervention

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use aircrack-ng because wireless WEP/WPA cracking utilities.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use aircrack-ng as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `aircrack-ng [options] <input file(s)>` as documented upstream for aircrack-ng.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair aircrack-ng with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `aircrack-ng --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: aircrack-ng - a 802.11 WEP / WPA-PSK key cracker
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install aircrack-ng. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `aircrack-ng [options] <input file(s)>`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: wireless WEP/WPA cracking utilities.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: aircrack-ng - a 802.11 WEP / WPA-PSK key cracker.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install aircrack-ng
Install with: sudo apt install aircrack-ng
